question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
effective_question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
answer:
Based on the results of the anomaly detection on the winding temperature of transformer T-019 for the past 7 days, there were 10 anomalous readings detected, resulting in an anomaly rate of 1.39%. The anomalies occurred on the following dates and times:

- January 4, 2024, at 07:00:00 and 18:00:00
- January 6, 2024, at 21:00:00
- January 8, 2024, at 19:00:00
- (and 6 other instances, but the list was truncated)

These anomalies indicate persistent abnormal periods in the winding temperature of transformer T-019 over the past 7 days.
